description:
## 1.0.0-dev.1 (2026-07-04)

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

* **classification:** enable move classification for user moves when My Side Only is active ([6bb2a12](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/6bb2a12a4d2fa20e4e1314d216370e358679a61f))
* **eval-bar:** stabilize eval bar and move WDL to horizontal strip below board ([d2ef96c](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/d2ef96c6ee329469ec528877100b96d7bccdacaa))
* **lichess-puzzle:** fix closed cursor crash and update download_offset incrementally ([398e950](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/398e9509f54d60dec9094b1ab8d46e6e2c077b60))
* **lichess-puzzle:** resolve NullPointerException on progress overlay initialization ([5a0f72d](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/5a0f72da3be73b060bd5b24fcf3160135dd528f0))
* **lichesspuzzle & stockfish:** resolve concurrency, UI overlap, timer reset, and game review bugs ([132b9b0](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/132b9b063759ef5d52a806254d071dd725243a23))
* rename discussion template to match category slug ([32fa2a3](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/32fa2a3704a2004d01d04f7dd70a9e11d91c1e3b))
* **stockfish:** correct move classification priority and update settings defaults ([f4c8e84](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/f4c8e84061bd9d12527dec6c14ecad7763666a29))
* **ui:** reposition WDL bar and Mate announcement above the board to prevent overlapping ([d1eb46b](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/d1eb46b35e18b3fe8ad73547dd8920761c07329e))

### ✨ New Features

* Add database download options dialog to levelmap and update Morphe Manager link in README ([d6c90bd](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/d6c90bdb3b426e7bc593fc3504fe7bfa8514a626))
* Cache theme counts in SharedPreferences to make UI loading instant ([40ff17b](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/40ff17bbbbbc011115ad38a3c3fc8f02fdb7ff3e))
* **ci:** auto-release datasets via release.yml and point downloads to database release ([9ef6a64](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/9ef6a6418dea8a7917d4009cca662b0e4412e7df))
* **fair-play:** implement Fair Play Analysis Controls, warnings, silent mode, and post-game summary ([01d2993](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/01d299326b9c2b01cc32668c5ce39177e99b23e4))
* **gestures:** hide all overlays on double-tap and fix WDL percentage scale ([8a6c65f](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/8a6c65f5d6deeded7a78470cd8218f9ccdf5b522))
* implement universal bot unlocking patch and fix UI/matchmaking crashes ([cbd41df](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/cbd41df4b9d7debf904f921f356299b995da1e76))
* initial lichess puzzle implementation (fallback point) ([c2e0106](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/c2e010671791600b5b0adb8dba0c5d137ef3781c))
* integrate Stockfish engine, settings menu, and migrate packages to app.prathxm.chess ([c89fd4f](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/c89fd4f6263dfe362a1591f90bbb751016958788))
* **lichess-puzzle:** add 5 download sizes and GitHub Action database auto-updater ([e003a85](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/e003a8587aff640fe5c5e0778d16927610435942))
* **lichess-puzzle:** add download size selector, fix milestones and display active theme ([304d460](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/304d460fd4e3ed36997b0c1188f380e0dae70b85))
* **lichess-puzzle:** add support for thematic puzzle categories and category progress tracking ([c48450a](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/c48450a076a7e7e92ba03c1d1b21095e526d52db))
* **lichess-puzzle:** integrate gamified streak progress bar and premium UI elements into journey map activity ([c057640](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/c057640fc2d5bb766df94fb423b911494707514a))
* **lichess-puzzle:** migrate offline puzzle storage to persistent SQLite database ([72cb24d](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/72cb24d29f065533664ff89daec0985799ce0841))
* **lichess-puzzle:** refine standalone puzzle journey, board rendering, game sounds, and daily puzzle completions ([4157eae](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/4157eaeb1635bd11675d318c501b7d9dc80278ad))
* **patch:** add custom titles patch and Java extension ([861a65d](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/861a65d9d72489177c8781accc745a6fbaf285ee))
* **puzzles:** align LichessPuzzleJourney UI with premium Chess.com standards ([b4cdfa0](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/b4cdfa07a20539a2a3667e997ffa617d25cb699b))
* refine settings UI, add Clone App patch, and stabilize fair play logic ([dc59037](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/dc59037f129b9eac16579c63634ba02225a7af0f))
* **stockfish:** add move classification, blunder alerts, custom settings UI, and workflows ([2032146](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/2032146a06d24b372ee459e6980e3b417a3079bc))
* **stockfish:** dynamic reflection for local analysis flow and offline review integration ([29594f0](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/29594f06c773a2699daf8d97ddc4221d20120c4a))
* **stockfish:** stabilize game review, add dynamic rating logic, and update roadmap ([845dbed](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/845dbed9e087e788e48ef1f67cc8b5ca59245ad4))

### 🔧 Improvements

* Optimize theme puzzle counts loading to be asynchronous ([ce2af8c](https://github.com/PrathxmOp/Prathxm-Patches/commit/ce2af8ccedded35a96bfc43b62697c905c903cd1))
